ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number (SSN) of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username for each user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last user login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_locked_until" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account is locked until after multiple failed login attempts */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who last updated the user account */,
  "is_2fa_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if two-factor authentication is enabled for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (JSON format) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who last updated the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Session token for authentication */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user during the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session expires */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the session is active */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity during the session */,
  "session_data" TEXT /* JSON-formatted data about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, action) */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the activity */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user during the activity */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user during the activity */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the preference */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key of the preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the preference is the default one for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_security_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security question */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the question */,
  "question" TEXT /* Security question */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer to the security question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the security question is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_security_questions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_mfa_methods" (
  "mfa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MFA method */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the MFA method */,
  "mfa_type" TEXT /* Type of MFA (e.g., SMS, email, app) */,
  "mfa_key" TEXT /* Key or token for the MFA method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the MFA method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the MFA method was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the MFA method is the default one for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mfa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_mfa_methods_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the token */,
  "token_type" TEXT /* Type of token (e.g., API, reset password) */,
  "token_value" TEXT /* Value of the token */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token expires */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the token is active */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the audit event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of audit event (e.g., login, logout, action) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit event occurred */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Details of the audit event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the audit event */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user during the audit event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the audit event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
